title: Dark's Horror: The Beginning
description: Face your fears in the first Season of a terrifying Minecraft horror saga
body:
[![create a server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4336fc9600834b1e250e3b3cbf6176fcabc55cc8_0.webp)](https://billing.enderhost.co/aff.php?aff=6)

# Dark’s Horror: The Beginning

Welcome to the first Season of the Dark’s Horror series. This modpack transforms Minecraft into a horror survival experience with creepy mobs, immersive shaders, and a chilling atmosphere.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/358b663a00f9953fa4718a1dddd22a14f7808066.png)

## Horror-Themed Additions & Mods
- Terrifying mobs that stalk you in the dark
- Creepy sounds and ambient effects to keep you on edge
- Performance and shader improvements for a smooth but scary experience

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1c3b222fb90fabf712019b8ef196439b07820b0_0.webp)
## Immersive Experience & Menus
- Dark-themed custom main menu for an atmospheric start
- Enhanced visuals with shaders to create eerie caves, forests, and abandoned places
- Sound and lighting tweaks for maximum tension
  
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6611301e05e8488bfb5af812fcccb0196934761_0.webp)
## Survival Horror Gameplay

- Explore dangerous environments where every step could be your last
- Gather resources carefully while avoiding new threats
- Fight to survive in a world that feels alive and haunted

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2373b935c97ff725990f7236cf9854c201aaac94_0.webp)

## This modpack includes the following mods.

## Multiplayer Support

Play with friends and see who can survive the night. The horror is always better when shared.

Want to host a server for your friends? Get one instantly with [Wabbanode](https://wabbanode.com/affiliate/darkshorrorthebeginning) – affordable prices, instant setup, and optimized performance for modded servers. Use code "DARK" for 25% off

**Warning: This modpack is designed for a horror experience. Play at your own risk.**

This is just the beginning.
This is **Dark’s Horror: The Beginning**.
